title: Remain
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90c91a5aab9af46de34806946d69b928ffae798b.png)

## Remain is a Zombie + SCP Apocalypse Modpack.
**Remain is set in the Modern age with Guns and Technology filled with very dangerous SCP creatures and loads of Zombies.**  
**Can you survive the Zombie Hordes and SCP Containment Breaches?!**

[![alt text](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fz4uivqmzunmkvtqd5hgu/tY38mPK.png?rlkey=qin5rs3z35sc2dgw82rrivsvp&st=5ikn6u6o&dl=1)](ttps://www.bisecthosting.com/p/lunapixel)
